title: Fixing Internet Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Internet not working? Start with the basics.
• Is WiFi on and connected to the right network?
• Turn WiFi off and back on to refresh the connection.
• Still stuck? Restart your router by unplugging it for 30 seconds.

steps.say: Read the error — no internet connection.
Open WiFi Settings to check your connection.
WiFi is connected but no internet. Toggle WiFi off.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the WiFi! Toggling WiFi off and on refreshes the connection — a simple first fix.
drDigitalHint: Open WiFi Settings, toggle WiFi off then back on, and reconnect to your network.
